description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tbd4vcv-win that runs on push to the vcv branch and on pull requests to vcv. Use a single windows-latest job with MSYS2 shell, checking out the repository with submodules, setting up MSYS2 with MINGW64, and installing required packages. Then, run a custom CI build script, archive binaries, create a draft pre-release with a generated tag and name, and upload the archived binaries as a release asset.
